scheme_name: State Agriculture Thesis Grant for M.Sc. Agriculture
page_title: State Agriculture Thesis Grant for M.Sc. Agriculture

details: The scheme “State Agriculture Thesis Grant for M.Sc. Agriculture” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Government of Nagaland to provide a Thesis Grant to all the inhabitants of Nagaland who passed the M.Sc. Agriculture programme under the State Plan of Education & Training.
benefits: Under the scheme, the Thesis Grant will be given to students according to the course/programme in which they are enrolled.
eligibility: A student should fulfill the following criteria to be eligible for this Scholarship:
The State Agriculture Thesis Grant will be applicable for all the inhabitants of Nagaland who passed the M.Sc. Agriculture.
Applicants must be from an Institution which has a valid AISHE/UDISE code.
Applicants must not be a beneficiary of any other scholarship scheme.

online: All eligible students shall apply through the Common Scholarship Portal:
To register, visit the official Common Scholarship Portal of Nagaland:

If the applicant is a new user, click on the "Register" option. Provide your MOBILE Number linked with AADHAAR to get an OTP and verify the mobile. Once Mobile is verified, provide essential details such as your name, email address and create a unique password. Click on the "Register" button to proceed.
Once your mobile number is verified, log in to your scholarship account using the credentials the applicant created during registration.
Step 03: Fill in the User Profile
Update your personal information, including name, date of birth, gender, category, Bank Account Details, etc.

Select your Scholarship Scheme, Institution, Institution State, Institution, District and proceed. Academic Information: Provide details about your educational background, such as school/college name, course, year of study, etc.
Depending on the scholarship applicants are applying for, applicants will need to upload supporting documents. Commonly required documents include:
Carefully review all the information applicants have entered and the documents applicants have uploaded. Make sure everything is accurate and complete.
Once applicants are satisfied with your application, click on the "Submit" button.
After submitting your application, applicants can track its status on the portal:
Log in to your account and check for updates on your application's status regularly.
In case errors are found after submission, please delete the application and Re-Submit.
If applicants have received a Scholarship in the previous year, kindly select ‘YES’ and provide the previous year's Application ID while filing profile.

In case of any issues kindly email the helpdesk with details of Registered Mobile Number, previous years Application ID (if applicable), Applicant query, and or any Screenshot/Error Message. Kindly allow us 24 hrs (working days) to check and respond to applicant emails.
The Bank Account must be that of the applicant. The application form will be rejected if the Bank Account is not of the applicant.
The Department will not be responsible for non-receipt of scholarship amount due to wrong/inactive bank account details provided by the applicant.

Applicant is warned that if he/she gives false statements/declarations/documents etc. or otherwise obtained a scholarship through fraudulent means, he/she will be blacklisted and debarred from getting a scholarship under this scheme or any other scholarship schemes for the entire period of his/her studies. The scholarship amount if already paid will also be recovered.
Incomplete/wrong entries in the e-form or incomplete enclosure of necessary documents will be subjected to rejection. Correction/rectification after online submission will not be entertained.

documents_required: Copy of the front page of the Bank Passbook or Bank Statement (clearly indicating the Account Holders Name, Account Number, Bank Branch, IFSC Code, link with Aadhaar, etc.)

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for this thesis grant?
faqs.answer: The State Agriculture Thesis Grant is applicable to all residents of Nagaland who have successfully completed their M.Sc. Agriculture program.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of the State Agriculture Thesis Grant?
faqs.answer: The Thesis Grant will be given to students according to the course/programme in which they are enrolled.

faqs.question: Can I apply if I'm pursuing my M.Sc. Agriculture degree?
How will the grant amount be disbursed?
faqs.answer: The grant amount is directly credited to the bank account provided by the applicant during the application process.

faqs.question: What is the significance of the AISHE/UDISE code requirement for applicants?
faqs.answer: Applicants must be enrolled in institutions that possess a valid AISHE/UDISE code to qualify for the grant.

faqs.question: Can applicants who are beneficiaries of other scholarship schemes apply for the State Agriculture Thesis Grant?
faqs.answer: No, applicants must not currently be benefiting from any other scholarship scheme to be eligible for the State Agriculture Thesis Grant.

faqs.question: How to apply under the scheme?
faqs.answer: All eligible students shall apply through the Common Scholarship Portal: https://scholarship.nagaland.gov.in

faqs.question: Can I edit my application after submission?
faqs.answer: No, once an application is submitted, you cannot make changes. Ensure all information is accurate before submitting your application. You can, however, Delete the submitted application and re-apply with necessary corrections, if you find errors in your application after SUBMISSION.

faqs.question: How can I track the status of my scholarship application?
faqs.answer: Log in to your account on the portal and/or navigate to the "Track Application" section. You can check the status of your application there.
